notes: Original 04a default uses only SD=0.30; CLI supports multiple fractions.
This run tested 0.20, 0.25, 0.30, 0.35, 0.40 around the official old SD=0.30.
Strict balanced-score best is SD=0.25 with 6 classes; canonical continuation recommendation is SD=0.30 because it gives exactly 5 classes and matches the old official pipeline cut.
